title: TinyPack
description: Small tech modpack inspired by direwolf20's modpack.
body:
TinyPack is a small tech modpack, it add ores, machines, better generation, tools and some fun. Play this modpack alone or with some friends. TinyPack do not have quest, you can do whatever you want.

## Why downloading it ?
We provide fun, we used the best mods available. If you want to go back to older Minecraft version TinyPack is **THE** pack for you.

### Before Playing:
Bugs are common please report every bugs in comments.

Waila: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila)

Dense Ores: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dense-ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dense-ores)

GraveStone mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod)
